n: Data Analysis with AI — Challenge Series

S.n: Data Analysis with AI — Challenge Series

B.x: Data Analysis with AI
Challenge Series
Level up your AI-assisted analysis skills through hands-on challenges
WORKSHOP

S.n: Five Challenges Build From Basics to Mastery

B.x: OVERVIEW
Five Challenges Build From Basics to Mastery
Each challenge builds on the previous, progressively deepening your AI prompting and analysis skills.

S.n: Summarize a Dataset — Your First AI Analysis Task

B.x: CHALLENGE 1
Summarize a Dataset — Your First AI Analysis Task

B.title: Summarize a Dataset
B.desc: Use an AI prompt to generate a clear, concise summary of a provided dataset. Focus on key statistics, distributions, and notable values.

B.x: Goal: Craft a prompt that extracts meaningful insights from raw data in plain language.

S.n: Find Patterns — Move From Description to Discovery

B.x: CHALLENGE 2
Find Patterns — Move From Description to Discovery

B.title: Find Patterns
B.desc: Guide the AI to identify trends, correlations, and anomalies in a dataset. Iterate on your prompts to surface deeper patterns.

B.x: Goal: Use iterative prompting to go beyond surface stats and uncover actionable patterns.

S.n: Build a Report — Synthesize Insights Into a Deliverable

B.x: CHALLENGE 3
Build a Report — Synthesize Insights Into a Deliverable

B.title: Build a Report
B.desc: Combine your summaries and pattern findings into a structured analytical report. Use AI to assist with formatting, narrative flow, and executive summary generation.

B.x: Goal: Produce a polished, structured report ready for stakeholder review using AI-assisted synthesis.

S.n: Progressive Hints Unlock as You Need Them

B.x: HINTS
Progressive Hints Unlock as You Need Them
Start with context: tell the AI what the dataset contains, its size, and your goal before asking for analysis.
B.title: Hint 1 — Set the Context

B.x: If results are too generic, add constraints: ask for top 3 insights, specify the audience (e.g. 'for a non-technical manager'), or request a specific format.
B.title: Hint 2 — Add Constraints

B.x: Chain your prompts: summarize first, then ask 'Based on this summary, what patterns should I investigate?' — each output becomes input for the next prompt.
B.title: Hint 3 — Chain Your Prompts

S.n: Prompt Templates Accelerate Your Analysis Workflow

B.x: TEMPLATES
Prompt Templates Accelerate Your Analysis Workflow

You are a data analyst. I have a dataset called {{dataset}}.

My question is: {{question}}

Please provide:
1. A direct answer to the question
2. Key supporting evidence from the data
3. Any caveats or limitations I should be aware of

You are a data analyst. I have a dataset called 'monthly_sales_2024.csv'.

My question is: Which product categories showed the strongest growth in Q4?

Please provide:
1. A direct answer to the question
2. Key supporting evidence from the data
3. Any caveats or limitations I should be aware of

S.n: Complete These Challenges and Ship Real Analysis Skills

B.x: OUTCOMES
